title: System Functions
description: The system shall allow applicants to submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.

title: Detailed Functional Specification
description: The system shall extract key information from CVs, including skills and years of experience.

title: Viewing and Editing the CV
description: The system shall allow applicants to view and edit their parsed CV.

title: Answering Screening Questions
description: The system shall allow applicants to answer screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.

title: Getting a Rating for the Submitted CV
description: The system shall provide a rating for the submitted CV based on the similarity between the applicant's CV and the job requirements.
